---
title: "References — Single cell & cell reports"
---

Literature underpinning CTIR's [`cellreportR`](https://github.com/CTTIR/cellreportR) and adjacent single-cell methods.

::: {.callout-warning}
## TODO_FILL_BEFORE_DEPLOY

Awaiting DOI-verified citations. Expected entries:

- Seurat (Hao et al., current edition)
- SingleCellExperiment / Bioconductor single-cell stack (Amezquita et al., 2020)
- scran normalisation (Lun, McCarthy, Marioni, 2016)
- scater QC (McCarthy, Campbell, Lun, Wills, 2017)
- Orchestrating Single-Cell Analysis with Bioconductor (OSCA) book chapters as appropriate
:::
